repository.name: MultiCord Official Templates
repository.description: Official Discord bot templates for MultiCord CLI

basic.name: Basic Discord Bot
basic.description: Simple, extensible Discord bot with command handling and event processing
basic.author: MultiCord Team

2.0.0: Security: Token now stored in .env file (BREAKING CHANGE)
Feature: Auto-loads cogs from cogs/ directory
Enhancement: Structured logging with file and console output
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with command handling and event processing

moderation.name: Moderation Bot
moderation.description: Minimal scaffolding bot that loads moderation features from moderation-tools cog
moderation.author: MultiCord Team

auto_install_cogs.reason: Provides all moderation commands (kick, ban, mute, warn, etc.)

2.1.0: Feature: Auto-installs moderation-tools cog during creation
Enhancement: Template is now minimal scaffolding (~160 lines)
Enhancement: Moderation logic moved to reusable cog
2.0.0: Security: Token now stored in .env file (BREAKING CHANGE)
Feature: Auto-loads cogs from cogs/ directory
Enhancement: Structured logging with file and console output
Enhancement: UTF-8 encoding for international characters
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with kick, ban, timeout, warn, and role management features

music.name: Music Bot
music.description: Minimal scaffolding bot that loads music features from music-player cog
music.author: MultiCord Team

auto_install_cogs.reason: Provides all music playback commands (join, leave, play, pause, queue, etc.)

2.1.0: Feature: Auto-installs music-player cog during creation
Enhancement: Template is now minimal scaffolding (~160 lines)
Enhancement: Music logic moved to reusable cog
2.0.0: Security: Token now stored in .env file (BREAKING CHANGE)
Feature: Auto-loads cogs from cogs/ directory
Enhancement: Structured logging with file and console output
Enhancement: FFmpeg detection with helpful error messages
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with YouTube integration, queue management, and playback controls

notes: Requires ffmpeg to be installed on the system
May require additional configuration for some hosting providers

business.name: Professional Business Bot
business.description: Production-ready bot template for commissioned projects with automatic cog loading and enterprise features
business.author: MultiCord Team

2.0.1: Fix: Added missing .env.example file for CLI auto-creation
Security: Now fully aligned with v2.0.0 token security standards
2.0.0: Enhancement: Added cogs/.gitkeep for directory structure
Consistency: Aligned with other templates for v2.0.0 release
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with automatic cog loading, structured logging, and production-ready features

notes: Designed as a foundation for commissioned Discord bot projects
Automatically loads all cogs from the cogs/ directory
Use 'multicord cog add' to install additional features
Supports both .env files and environment variables for configuration
Production-ready with comprehensive logging and error handling

general.name: General Purpose
general.description: Basic bots, utility bots, starter templates

moderation.name: Moderation & Administration
moderation.description: Community management, anti-spam, logging, role management

entertainment.name: Entertainment & Games
entertainment.description: Music bots, games, fun commands, trivia

advanced.name: Advanced Templates
advanced.description: Complex architectures, multi-service bots, advanced patterns

permissions.name: Custom Permissions System
permissions.description: Enterprise-grade hierarchical permission system with intelligent role detection
permissions.author: HollowTheSilver

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with 9-level permission hierarchy, role classification, and Unicode normalization

moderation-tools.name: Moderation Tools
moderation-tools.description: Comprehensive moderation toolkit with kick, ban, mute, warn, and auto-moderation features
moderation-tools.author: MultiCord Team

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with kick, ban, unban, mute, unmute, warn, warnings, clear, slowmode commands and auto-moderation

music-player.name: Music Player
music-player.description: Music playback bot with queue management, YouTube support, and voice controls
music-player.author: MultiCord Team

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with join, leave, play, pause, resume, stop, skip, queue, nowplaying, volume commands

administration.name: Administration & Security
administration.description: Permission systems, admin tools, security features
